ss.label: SUPERSET 1
ss.ar: Band pull-aparts — 15 reps, slow and controlled

exs.name: Seated Cable Row (Wide Grip)
exs.cue: Drive elbows back and down — feel the scapulae squeeze together at the top. Control the return for a full 4 seconds. No forward lean on the pull.

exs.name: Rear Delt Cable Fly (Single Arm, High Anchor)
exs.cue: Stand side-on to the cable stack. Pull across your body at face height, leading with the elbow. Squeeze the rear delt at full extension — don't let the shoulder roll forward.

ss.label: SUPERSET 2
ss.ar: Thoracic rotation — 8 reps each side on hands and knees

exs.name: Lat Pulldown (Neutral Grip)
exs.cue: Initiate with the lats — depress the shoulder blades before you pull. Pull to upper chest, then resist the bar back up for a full 4-count eccentric. No shrugging.

exs.name: Face Pull (Rope, Eye Level)
exs.cue: Pull the rope to your face, separating the handles at the end — thumbs finish pointing behind you. Hold 1 second at peak contraction. This is rotator cuff and rear delt work — not a rowing motion.

exs.name: Bent Over Barbell Row
exs.cue: Hinge to 45°, brace the core. Pull the bar to your lower sternum — not your belly button. 4-second lower on every rep. Dropset on set 3: drop 20%, grind out 6-8 more.

exs.name: Scapular Wall Slide
exs.cue: Stand with back flat against wall, arms in goalpost position. Slide arms overhead while keeping every part of your arm in contact with the wall. If you can't, you've found your mobility limit — work there.

exs.name: Cable External Rotation (Elbow at Side)
exs.cue: Elbow pinned to your side at 90°. Rotate the forearm outward against the cable. This is protecting your shoulder joint — go light and feel the infraspinatus working, not momentum.

exs.name: Prone Y-T-W (DB or Bodyweight)
exs.cue: Lie face down on an incline bench. Move through Y (arms overhead), T (arms out wide), W (bend elbows to 90°) positions. Keep the movement slow — this is rehab-level shoulder work that pays dividends.

exs.name: Dead Hang
exs.cue: Passive hang — let gravity decompress the spine. Shoulders should rise toward ears in a fully passive position. Time each attempt. Rest 60s between. Goal: 45+ seconds per attempt.
